output_rule: Character portrait resources fit under ui_run_character_portrait_frame_empty_ref_01. Portrait PNGs are frame-sized with transparent outer margin; frame is drawn separately above.

assets.runtime_rule: Draw portrait first, then draw portrait_frame_empty_ref_01 above it. The portrait already has transparent outer padding to avoid rectangular leakage.

style.palette: grayscale dirty manga portrait, charcoal background, low-saturation skin/shirt, black messy hair, small purple-blue electronic glints
style.avoid: no text, no frame baked into portrait, no bright clean anime color, no full-body crop
